code:
import string
import io

fn byte_or_neg(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    -1
  end
end

fn is_hspace(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9
end

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut sum = 0

while i < n
  while i < n and is_hspace(byte_or_neg(input, i))
    i = i + 1
  end
  if i < n
    let b = byte_or_neg(input, i)
    if b == 10 or b == 13
      i = i + 1
    else
      while i < n and not is_ws(byte_or_neg(input, i))
        i = i + 1
      end
      while i < n and is_hspace(byte_or_neg(input, i))
        i = i + 1
      end
      let start = i
      while i < n and not is_ws(byte_or_neg(input, i))
        i = i + 1
      end
      let tok = string.substring(input, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        sum = sum + v
      when None
        ()
      end
      while i < n and byte_or_neg(input, i) != 10
        i = i + 1
      end
      if i < n
        i = i + 1
      end
    end
  end
end

print("sum=#{sum}")
